zh-CN.name: 煎饼
zh-CN.intro: 煎饼是小朋友最喜欢的早餐之一，圆圆的、金黄色的，香香软软的。它用面糊做成，可以配上甜甜的果酱吃。

story.title: 🥞太阳煎饼
story.body: 小美早上醒来，闻到厨房里飘来香香的味道。她跑过去一看，妈妈正在做煎饼。妈妈把面糊倒进平底锅里，面糊嗞嗞地响，变成了一张圆圆的金黄色大饼。妈妈翻了几下，饼就变得软软的。小美帮妈妈涂上果酱，叠起来咬一口，啊，真好吃！妈妈说，煎饼是太阳公公送给我们的早餐，吃了身体棒棒的。小美说，我也要学做煎饼，给妈妈做！

knowledge.title: 煎饼是怎么做的？
knowledge.body: 煎饼的做法很简单。把面粉和水、鸡蛋、一点点盐混合成面糊。平底锅烧热，倒一勺面糊，摊成圆形，两面煎到金黄色就好了。可以配上果酱或蜂蜜吃。

en.name: Pancake
en.intro: Pancake is one of children's favorite breakfasts. It's round, golden yellow, soft, and smells delicious. It's made from batter, often enjoyed with sweet jam.

story.title: 🥞Sunshine Pancakes
story.body: One morning, Xiao Mei woke up to a lovely smell from the kitchen. She ran over and saw Mom making pancakes. Mom poured batter into the hot pan. It sizzled and turned into a big round golden pancake. Mom flipped it, and it became soft. Xiao Mei helped spread jam on it, folded it, and took a bite. Yummy! Mom said, Pancakes are like a breakfast gift from the sun. They make you strong. Xiao Mei said, I want to learn to make pancakes for you, Mom!

knowledge.title: How are pancakes made?
knowledge.body: Pancakes are easy to make. Mix flour, water, egg, and a pinch of salt into a batter. Heat a pan, pour a spoonful of batter, spread it into a circle, and cook both sides until golden brown. Enjoy with jam or honey.
